title: E2E, security checks and deployment profile documentation
objective: Verify legacy, CopilotKit and native AI UI drivers end to end, then document production deployment choices and rollback.
non_goals: Do not commit host-specific deployment files.
Do not store secrets outside deployment silos.
Do not enable telemetry in on-prem defaults.
acceptance_checks: E2E covers legacy, CopilotKit and native driver smoke paths.
Security checks cover invalid signature, expired actor payload and unauthorized UI command cases.
Deployment docs describe process matrix and reverse proxy routing.
Rollback returns to legacy sidebar by setting LOCAL_BUSINESS_AI_UI_DRIVER=legacy.
